titleStmt.title: SII 5.873: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 873. (A.R. No. 10 of 1896). ON A STONE NEAR THE NARASIMHASVAMIN TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti
ṭuttataṟ kellai kiḻpāṟ kellai Eccampi(k)kramavittar bhūmi yiṉ meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai maṭuviṉ vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai maṟuvikka kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ ke
llai paṅkiṭukaḷiṉ teṟkum Innāṟpāl lellaikkum naṭupaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam moḻiviṉṟi Ivvūrk kaḻani Aḷakkuṅ kolāl Āyirattaiṉūṟu kuḻiyum
Akamaṉaiyum paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattu kāvatippākkamākiya Avaṉinārāyaṇacaturvve timaṅkala miyāḷum kaṇattāruḷ Īṟaṉuṭu kaṇviḻcciṟ krama vi(y)
ttabha ṭṭar makaṉ Ātittadevakrama vi(y)ttabha ṭṭarkku bha ṭṭavṛ ttiyāka Ivaṉ pakkal Iṟaidravya mum vilaidravya mum Āka Irupatiṅ kaḻaiñcu poṉ(ṅ)
koṇṭu Ivvirupatiṉ(ṅ) kaḻaiñcu poṉṉukkum Eppeṟppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum coṟumāṭṭum Amacciyum veṭṭiyum Uvakaiyum vibhū tiyum maṟṟum
meppeṟppaṭṭa Iṟaiy koyil vāciṉṟu ponta Iṟai yellām(ṅ) kāttukkuṭuppomāṉom Ivvāyirattaiṉūṟu kuḻiyum maṉaiyum bha ṭṭavṛ ttiyāka vi
ṟṟu vilaiśrā vaṇai ceytu kuṭuttom sabhai yom Itaṟkum Erinirum niroṭukālum kiḻniṟkkum Urittāka Oṭṭi viṟṟu vilai śrā vaṇai ce
yatu kuṭuttom sabhai yom Idharmma m Āca ntra kālamum Irakṣi ppomākavum I dharmma m Irakṣippār geṅgāganyā ntat ceytār ceyta puṇya(ya)bhala
m peṟuvārākavum Idharmma ttukku virodham veṇṭinār geṅgāganyā ntañ ceytār ceyta pāpapalam Anubha vippārākavum Itaṟkituvey śrā vaṇaiyum po
ruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷccilavum Ituveyāka Oṭṭi viṟṟu vilaiśrā vaṇai ceytukuṭuttom sabhai yom Itaṟṟiṟampil Aṉṟāḷ kovukku rattai māttā(ta)l mevveṟu ni
ratanāle kālkkāṇam taṇṭappaṭuvārākavum Ittaṇṭa(m)ñ ceṉṟu muṉṟu puḷḷi kuttuvikka peṟātomākavum Ittaṇṭappaṭṭum Ivolai meṟppaṭṭa parice
Digital edition of SII 5.873 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
